auth.label: Application Password
auth.placeholder: xxxx xxxx xxxx xxxx xxxx xxxx
auth.description: WordPress application password used as the Basic Auth password. Create one in WordPress admin from Users > Profile > Application Passwords: https://developer.wordpress.org/rest-api/using-the-rest-api/authentication/#basic-authentication-with-application-passwords

extraFields.label: Site URL
extraFields.description: Public HTTPS WordPress site URL used as the REST API host. Site roots and URLs ending in /wp-json or /wp-json/wp/v2 are accepted.

extraFields.label: Username
extraFields.description: WordPress username paired with the application password for REST API Basic authentication.

actions.name: list_categories
actions.description: List WordPress categories with optional filters and pagination.

search.description: Limit results to resources matching this search string.

page.description: The page number of WordPress results to return.

perPage.description: The maximum number of WordPress results to return.

order.description: The sort direction for WordPress list results.

include.description: Term IDs to include in the response.

exclude.description: Term IDs to exclude from the response.

parent.description: Parent term ID used to filter child terms.

slug.description: Term slugs used to filter WordPress terms.

hideEmpty.description: Whether to hide terms not assigned to any post.

orderby.description: The field used to sort WordPress terms.

inputSchema.description: Input parameters for listing WordPress terms.

categories.description: The WordPress categories returned by the list request.

anyOf.description: The total number of matching WordPress resources.
